description: Balanced ethical resilience scoring across protection equity governance recognition accountability burden shift and implementation burden.
Prioritizes protective effectiveness while still penalizing burden shifting.
Prioritizes fair distribution of risk resources and recovery.
Prioritizes governance legitimacy participation and decision authority.
Prioritizes recognition of histories identities local knowledge cultural continuity and rights.
Prioritizes responsibility assignment corrective action public reporting and answerability.
Strongly penalizes strategies that shift cost risk labor or displacement onto vulnerable groups.
Penalizes high implementation burden where institutional capacity funding or participation resources are limited.
